title: Rebuild 10 You are not alone Reviews Spoilers
display_title: Rebuild 10 You are not alone Reviews Spoilers
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild 1:0 "You are (not) alone" Reviews/Spoilers Post by Vampire Killer » Sat Sep 01, 2007 3:00 am THIS THREAD CONTAINS SPOILERS The first movie releases tomorrow. Has there been any movie reviews yet? Just curious.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Sep 01, 2007 7:26 am Anonymous of /a/ wrote: THE LAST LINE OF THE MOVIE IS: "I LOOK FOWARD TO MEETING YOU Shinji IKARI" BY KAWORU, SPOKEN ON THE MOON. "I know. That boy has awoken, and we've entered the generalization phase. And to think, number 3... You really haven't changed. I look foward to meeting you, Shinji Ikari" -KAWORU, ON THE FUCKING MOON. (わかっているよ。あちらの少年が目覚め、概括の段階に入ったんだろ？ また三番目とはね 。変わらないな君は 。会える時が楽しみだよ 碇シンジ君。 -カヲル) THE BATTLE WITH RAMIEL WHO IS NOW THE 6TH ANGEL (SUGGESTING KAWORU IS "NUMBER 3") IS GREATLY EXPANDED. RAMIEL SHAPESHIFTS WHEN HE FIRES HIS ENERGY BEAM. GENDO CLAIMS THERE ARE 8 ANGELS REMAINING. ADAM APPEARS TO BE ON THE MOON AS WELL. Misato, WHO APPEARS TO HAVE KNOWN OF TERMINAL DOGMA ALL ALONG, SHOWS Shinji LILITH TO CONVINCE HIM HE MUST PILOT THE EVA IN ORDER TO PREVENT 3RD IMPACT. THE SEA IS RED FROM THE BEGINNING OF THE MOVIE. THERE IS A MARK FROM GIANT Rei ON THE MOON. IT IS STRONGLY SUGGESTED THAT THE MOVIE IS A CONTINUATION OF THE SERIES THUS FAR, AND THAT HISTORY IS REPEATING ITSELF. IN THE NEXT MOVIE, THERE WILL BE A NEW FEMALE EVA PILOT WITH GLASSES.

[]: Post by Reichu » Sat Sep 01, 2007 7:30 am Isn't that more like "SPOYLURZ" than a "review" per se?

[]: Post by Hunter21 » Sat Sep 01, 2007 7:59 am Here is what Wiki is saying about the differences between the series and the movie. *The color of the sea is depicted as red, instead of being blue. *Sachiel is attacked by ordinary bombs and missiles, before being attacked with a NÂ² bomb. *The NERV logo has been slightly changed *The Seele logo has been changed. *Shinji wears an ID card on his chest within NERV headquarters. *The Eva launch sequence is primarily done with CGI. *Unit 01 now features various glowing, green colored bands. *Before returning to Misato's apartment, Shinji and Misato go shopping for food. *Within the convenience store and Misato's apartment, corporate product placement is visible (Lawson Convenience Stores, Frito Lay, Yebisu Beer, Kirin Beer, and UCC Coffee). *When Shinji and Misato watch Tokyo3 go underground, the scene is primarily done with CGI. *Shamshel's segmented limbs are completely CGI. *Unit 01 uses a gattling-gun against Shamsel, instead of a simple rifle. *After grabbing Shamshelâ€™s "energy whips", Unit 01â€™s hands are revealed to be composed of humanoid flesh. *Unit 01's progressive knife is housed in the upper-portion of the shoulder. *When Shamshel is killed, he entirely liquifies into blood, except for his "energy whips", which remain imbedded in Unit 01. *When running away from home, Shinji spends a night sleeping in a business district, within a cardboard box. *Shinji ends up walking to a portion of highway which was damaged by his latest fight, and finally decides he wants to return home. *After making this decision, NERV agents appear, and return Shinji to Tokyo-3. *Ramiel is almost entirely animated with CGI, and when attacking or defending changes shape. *When devising the plan to combat Ramiel, Misato holds a short meeting with the other adults, so they can discuss an effective strategy. *The preparations for the battle with Ramiel are more involved, and shown with greater detail. *Shinji explains to Misato that piloting an Eva is scary for him, but it must seem easy to Misato because she observes everything from behind a computer terminal. *Lilith (said to be Adam) is shown to Shinji, and Misato explains that the angels are attacking Tokyo3 because they want to free "Adam", and trigger a "third impact". *Touji and Kensuke send a Shinji a message wishing him good luck with his next encounter. *Before engaging Ramiel directly, NERV utilizes a variety of conventional weapons (missiles, heavy artillery, etc.). *Shinji hits Ramiel with an initial beam of energy, but it does not kill Ramiel. Ramiel's response nearly destroys the entire mountain which houses Unit 01 and Unit 00. *Gendou recommends having Rei take the next shot at Ramiel, but Misato objects, and says that Shinji will remember the encouraging words from Touji and Kensuke, and regain his confidence. *When killed, Ramiel hardens into a spiked-ball and explodes into a rain of blood. *Shinji uses Unit 01's progressive knife to remove Unit 00's entry plug, so he can free Rei. *Kaworu is introduced at the end of the film. He rises naked from a box, and speaks directly with Seele 01, and concludes by saying he wants to hurry and meet Shinji.

[]: Post by achassi » Sat Sep 01, 2007 8:00 am Loads a Spoilers there haha

[]: Post by Reichu » Sat Sep 01, 2007 8:22 am Odd. Some of those aren't actual differences. When killed, Ramiel hardens into a spiked-ball and explodes into a rain of blood.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Sep 01, 2007 8:25 am IN THE NEXT MOVIE, THERE WILL BE A NEW FEMALE EVA PILOT WITH GLASSES WITH HOTS FOR Shinji.

[]: Post by Reichu » Sat Sep 01, 2007 8:27 am And much profit shall be had. Is that really the best they could come up with? Seriously. :roll:

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Sep 01, 2007 8:29 am Anonymous of /a/ wrote: ・最初から補完委員会ではなくゼーレが出ている （モノリスは全部で6体・モノリスの番号の上に新たな紋章・モノリスの後 ろに生命の樹の紋章） ・セントラルドグマにあるのがリリスで、アダムはカヲル君のそばにあった 。ミサトはすでに知っている 　リリスは第二使徒。付けている仮面が第四使徒サキエルの顔と同じ。カヲ ルの側にあった巨人には 前作でのリリスが着けていた仮面があった。 ・シンジがまた３番目なのかと、カヲル君は前作の記憶を継承してる。全裸 （リメイクとはいえなくらい話が違ってきており、カヲルの台詞から今作は 別の世界の話、もしくは数千年後？） ・カヲルの側にあった柩みたいのは画面を見た限りでは全部で６体。 ・乳首解禁 ・おしり丸出し解禁 ・新キャラ登場、新エヴァ登場（第６号機？）量産型はカット？ ・虹の演出が多い ・補完計画が２７次になっていた。（中間報告？） ・使徒のコアが消滅すると死体は血の海になって消滅 （ＡＴフィールドが維持できなくなり、ディラックの海に還る演出？） ・使途の数が減っている４番目がサキエルで残り８体。全１２使徒 ・初号機起動時に無人の初号機がシンジをかばうシーンをカット ・綾波が笑うところでゲンドウのカットインなし ・月に前作の劇場版でついた、綾波の血のあとが残っている ・時に、西暦2015年のテロップがないため現在の時点で西暦何年なのか不明 ・次回作の新キャラは女？

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Sep 01, 2007 8:36 am I've been saying since the announcement of the new character that it would be a hottie girl with glasses. It's one of the few classic moe qualities they haven't touched yet. I buy it. Whats most curious to hear is that there's a subtle rumor its a sequel? Eh? Plus just found this. Reviews are honest, speak of the good and give valid points on what could be problematic. http://heiseidemocracy.com/2007/09/01/movie-review-evangelion-shin-gekijouban-jo-evangelion-10-you-are-not-alone/

[]: Post by Rawinder » Sat Sep 01, 2007 9:33 am Reichu wrote: And much profit shall be had. Is that really the best they could come up with? Seriously. :roll:

[]: Post by Indigo Arcangel » Sat Sep 01, 2007 9:33 am "Whats most curious to hear is that there's a subtle rumor its a sequel? Eh?" Like a repetition of events? Dare I say it, sort of like RE-Take? :shock: From review - "Plus, you get to see Reiâ€™s nipple when sheâ€™s changing into her plug-suit before going off to fight the third Angel. " Oh, come on. Give me a break :roll:

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Sep 01, 2007 9:41 am It was only a matter of time until she grew a pair. Anywho its the definition of fanservice. And if Anno goes all Anno on us then that nipple could turn out to the "Nipple to End All Time". Review always states theres 8 more Angels. I'd like to assume since Film 2 has to start branching out into new Areas with Glasses Girl and Moon-Kaworu taking a larger preference the Angels could start being a mix of old and NEW! Keep the BIG classic EPIC confrontations (Gaghiel, Bardiel, Zeurel, Moon-Kaworu) and make the rest new ones that can really take advantage of the new animation. P.S. Finally Saw Hideaki Anno's "Cutie Honey" a few days ago. Rip-roaring, sugar coated fun! I hate to use Japanese words to describe something since I think it's lame but the Japanese have the only word to properly describe the film. Kawaii!!!

[]: Post by Indigo Arcangel » Sat Sep 01, 2007 9:48 am There could be a lot of potential in a "repetition of events" story. I mean. how would Shinji cope with finding out that in another life he turned the entire world into Tang? Seriously, though, I just can't get RE-take outta my head!

[]: Post by BobBQ » Sat Sep 01, 2007 10:29 am Reichu wrote: @Kaworu and Adam on the Moon: lolwut?

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Sep 01, 2007 10:31 am Anonymous of /a/ wrote: Just got back from the Eva movie: Generally speaking, quite good, well knit together, although it did feel a bit rushed. The redesigns of the Angels (especially the 5th) were quite awesome and worked well. The product placement was horrific: when they go to Misato's apartment there are 6 cuts in a row where you can see UCC cans, as well as all over the movie. Doritios, Ebisu, Kirin and Pizza Hut also make appearances. That said, the new Operation Yashima was so awesome I could have peed. I give the movie a DO WANT.

[]: Post by Indigo Arcangel » Sat Sep 01, 2007 10:44 am I'm not too annoyed about the product placement. We all knew it was going to happen. And anyway, it sorta makes it seem more real.

[]: Post by Shin-seiki » Sat Sep 01, 2007 10:53 am Some on /a/ are claiming that glasses girl is Mana. :roll:

[]: Post by Indigo Arcangel » Sat Sep 01, 2007 10:57 am I don't suppose anyone has any screenies? It's probably too soon for that.

[]: Post by NAveryW » Sat Sep 01, 2007 11:43 am MOE GIRL IS GOING TO DIE A HORRIBLE, VIOLENT DEATH AND Shinji WILL PROBABLY BE SOMEHOW RESPONSIBLE. Come on, guys, this is Anno. You know him. Then again, she could be... ahm... erm... you know... she's just definitely not going to be a regular moe-tye. Seriouslah. I'm really trying to do my best to avoid looking at spoilers, but I reeeally want to know moooorrreee.... SOMEONE SHOW ME MORE REVIEWS THAT EITHER DON'T HAVE SPOILERS OR HAVE SPOILERS CLEARLY MARKED!!! Two final statements from me: -Anno already SAID it was going to be an almost direct retelling of the first six episodes. I'm not quite sure if that qualifies as a complaint. Though it does still kind of feel slightly disappointing that, to see something REALLY new, we'll have to wait until some time in 2008... -Expect to see spoilers for this thing ALL OVER THE PLACE in a "Dumbledore kills Snape" type matter. Come on. EDIT: Also, I find it kind of interesting that so many food companies survived Second Impact. Good to know we'll have Pizza Hut and Doritos when everything goes apewire.

-3. *Ramiel is almost entirely animated with CGI, and when attacking or defending changes shape. *When devising the plan to combat Ramiel, Misato holds a short meeting with the other adults, so they can discuss an effective strategy. *The preparations for the battle with Ramiel are more involved, and shown with greater detail. *Shinji explains to Misato that piloting an Eva is scary for him, but it must seem easy to Misato because she observes everything from behind a computer terminal. *Lilith (said to be Adam) is shown to Shinji, and Misato explains that the angels are attacking Tokyo3 because they want to free "Adam", and trigger a "third impact". *Touji and Kensuke send a Shinji a message wishing him good luck with his next encounter. *Before engaging Ramiel directly, NERV utilizes a variety of conventional weapons (missiles, heavy artillery, etc.). *Shinji hits Ramiel with an initial beam of energy, but it does not kill Ramiel.
